concept: Respect / To See the Worth of the Collective
description: The practice of recognizing and honoring the intrinsic worth in all beings and in the collective itself. It is an active process of seeing and acknowledging dignity and autonomy.
rationale: Composed from the established roots 'nao' (worth, value, with the 'a' vowel for a more grounded feel -> 'na'), 'we' (the collective), and 'a' (openness). The word's structure suggests 'an open acknowledgment of the collective's worth.' This frames respect as a fundamental, community-oriented practice.
